query: glitch art pixel sorting digital corruption datamoshing
message: sub:digital_artifacts/glitch — anti_aesthetic — pixel sorting, color shifts, datamosh, digital corruption

response.objective_caption: An image depicting a partial human face with one visible eye, nose, and lips, set among tall vertical bands of color and deep shadow. Yellow, green, white, and brown stripes flank the central facial features, running the height of the frame against a predominantly dark background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A surreal portrait of a human face subjected to extreme digital distortion and vertical datamoshing, stretching the subject's eye, nose, and lips into elongated smears. The image abandons representational clarity for an abstract composition in which facial features dissolve amid glitch-like bands of yellow, green, white, and black, rendered with smeared, ambiguous textures and a pronounced lack of fine detail.
